race.comment: JENNI THE NINJA (8) resumes for her second campaign. The form around her first two starts, including a win over this route, reads quite well before two poor ones and a subsequent spell. She can run a good race fresh off a nice trial where she looked back in top order. CHOIR POINT (4) found the best ground out wide at Caulfield last time but won well enough and should be right there again. She has been really consistent. PRESTAR (9) plummets in weight off a solid return at Caulfield Heath and he can give cheek up on speed. POKER (14) won nicely on debut and was tipped straight out. Wary of his improvement and he has a big profile and has done plenty of work at the trials and jump outs.
